issues.sample: Loss of front brake effectiveness due to failure of hose between front master cylinder and reservoir.  Hose did not suffer impact damage or chafing.  Failure was a split approximately 1" along the length of the hose.

narrative.headline: What 2025 Ducati Multistrada V4 owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 1 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Service Brakes (100% of reports).
